title: Complaint resolution (admin side)
description: Admin views, manages, and resolves complaints.

subtasks.title: GET /api/admin/complaints
subtasks.description: List all complaints with filters (status, category, date range).

subtasks.title: PATCH /api/admin/complaints/:id
subtasks.description: Update status (open/in-progress/resolved) and add a resolution note.

subtasks.title: Admin UI: complaint management table
subtasks.description: Table with filters, status badges, and a detail/resolution modal.
